name: Legbiter
description: Legbiter, also known as Leg-Biter or Legbiter, is a legendary sword featured in Norse sagas, primarily associated with the hero Hogni of the Hjalmarsson clan. It is renowned for its exceptional sharpness and destructive capabilities, capable of cleaving through armor and flesh with ease. The sword's origins are shrouded in mystery, with some accounts suggesting it was forged by dwarves, imbuing it with magical properties. Legbiter's significance lies not only in its physical prowess but also in its symbolic representation of heroic valor and martial skill. Its name, directly translating to 'Leg-Biter,' emphasizes its brutal effectiveness in combat, often targeting the lower extremities of opponents to cripple them. The sword's legacy is intertwined with the fierce battles and heroic deeds of Hogni, solidifying its place as a treasured artifact within Norse lore. The sword is said to glow with a faint blue light when danger is near, alerting its wielder to potential threats. It is also believed that Legbiter possesses a degree of sentience, guiding the hand of its user in battle to strike the most vulnerable points. Over time, Legbiter has become a symbol of unwavering courage and the relentless pursuit of victory against insurmountable odds, making it a potent emblem of Norse heroism and martial prowess. Its legend continues to inspire tales of bravery and determination, reminding warriors of the importance of skill, strategy, and unwavering resolve in the face of adversity. The sagas often describe the chilling sound Legbiter makes as it cuts through bone, a sound that instilled fear in the hearts of enemies. Ownership of Legbiter was seen as a mark of great honor and responsibility, signifying the wielder's commitment to upholding justice and defending the weak. The sword's reputation preceded it, making it a formidable weapon on the battlefield and a coveted prize among warriors.
subtitle: The Leg-Biter: Hogni's Fearsome Sword
origin: Forged by Dwarves (according to some accounts)

keyMyths.title: Hogni's Battles
keyMyths.description: Legbiter is prominently featured in the sagas detailing Hogni's many battles, showcasing its effectiveness in combat. It played a crucial role in his victories and cemented his reputation as a formidable warrior.

keyMyths.title: The Sword's Legacy
keyMyths.description: The legends surrounding Legbiter emphasize its sharpness and ability to cleave through armor. Its name is a testament to its brutal effectiveness on the battlefield, especially against the legs of foes.

sources.author: Snorri Sturluson
sources.description: A collection of sagas about Norse kings.
sources.text: A collection of sagas about Norse kings.

sources.author: Unknown
sources.description: Collection of Norse stories featuring heroes and their weapons.
